notes: v0.5.5 — Live Render output is no longer locked to 1024×1024. New aspect-ratio dropdown (1:1, 16:9 widescreen, 9:16 portrait, 4:3, 3:4) plumbs through generationConfig.imageConfig.aspectRatio. All ratios cost the same $0.039/render (1290 image tokens regardless of shape). 16:9 = 1344×768 — better fit for typical SU widescreen viewports than the square default.
